question: The asthma survey considered in previous illustrative examples addresses a binomial random variable with $n=20$ and $p=0.04$. It follows that $q=1-0.04=0.96$.
answer: The expected value of this random variable $\mu=n p=20 \cdot 0.04=0.8$. It has variance $\sigma^2=n p q= 20 \cdot 0.04 \cdot 0.96=0.768$ and standard deviation $\sigma=\sqrt{n p q}= \sqrt{20 \cdot 0.04 \cdot 0.96}=0.8764$.

meta info.caption: Expected value and variance of a binomial random vari-able (Asthma survey).
